entry.title: BKP – Simplify your user input with proper variant setup via configuration activities
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Customer Returns Solution (Scope Item BKP) can handle different returns scenarios in an effective way.  The system pre-defined process variants and corresponding options empower you a variable and flexible end to end process scenarios.

By default, the process variants and their options are all activated as a maximum capability to consume. In your real customer returns business, you might just have certain returns processes which require a subset of process variant options. To simplify your user input, and improve user experience, you could utilize the available configuration activity to customize your business solutions.

Logistical follow up activity - Customer Returns (BKP Scope Item) offers a list of typical logistical follow up activities for you to consume and accelerate the logistical processing – corresponding follow up document would be auto triggered once released. 

  • Configuration activity 105526 Activate and Rename Follow-Up Activities

With this configuration, you can just activate and rename the necessary follow up activities according to your real business.

By default, all follow up activities are activated, you can deactivate some follow up activities which do not fit your real business.

For example,

  • You can de-activate 0005 and 0007 if in your customer returns, you never forward the returned product to your supplier.
  • You can de-activate 0008 and 0013 if you never have product inspection or keep the product at your customer site.
  • You can de-activate 0026 and 0027 if you don’t have in-house repair business with customer returns.

With proper activation of only needed follow up activities, you would see less options in follow up activities in returns item creation, or product inspection.  This makes it easier for your end users and ensure a precise process.

 

Refund Control - Customer Returns (BKP Scope Item) offers several refund control options to specify how and when the refund is to be processed.

Configuration activity 105716 Activate and Rename Refund Control

With this configuration, you can just activate and rename the necessary refund control according to your real business.

For example,

  • According to your refund policy, if you never have an immediate refund to customer, you can de-activate the option I Immediately.
  • Meanwhile, you can customize your meaningful description based on the two different refund types.

 

Note – for above two configuration activities, you had better de-activate the values that are not needed at the project beginning phase. If later you want to de-activate a specific value, system would check any returns order has already used the specific value.

  • For 2SL system, once a specific value is used in production system, you can’t de-activate it.
  • For 3SL system, once a specific value is used in test or production system, you can’t de-activate it.

 

Configuration activity 106585 Define Default Values for Customer Returns Apps

You could use this configuration activity to accelerate the user input in apps ‘Manage Customer Returns -Version 2’ and ‘Create Customer Return Without Reference - VA01 with default values’.

The returns process variant values can be defaulted at plant level.

With above default values, when you input the material number into the returns order item, system would set the default values for your configured variants.

You could utilize this configuration activity to reflect your main returns scenario.

 

With above configuration activities, you can improve your experience with the apps by simplifying the input.

 

Related Documents

Customer Returns at help portal

Customer Returns (BKP)

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 财务-成本会计常见热点问题汇总FAQ
entry.content:
欢迎来到我们的博客！在这篇文章中，我们将SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition上收集到的产品常见问题做汇总并且定期更新这篇文章，以反映SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition上常见问题最新的发展和变化。我们希望通过这样的方式，为您提供一个全面、及时的资源，帮助您更好地了解和利用SAP产品的功能。

本文涉及功能基于SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition 2402版本，后续版本如果有变化请参考本文最新信息。

1成本会计-本地部署版本OnPremise，ECC上常用功能在Cloud上的应用

1.1内部订单在S/4HANA Cloud上的应用

Q:      客户想使用内部订单对成本、费用进行归集并结算  

A:       在SAP S/4HANA Cloud里内部订单应用程序已被弃用(删除)。 

SAP推荐使用WBS元素代替。工作订单是后勤流程的一部分。 

详细的请见注释2865342 - Internal Orders in SAP S/4HANA on-premise edition

1.2成本差异还原到工单

Q:      客户想把成本差异还原到工单（生产订单、流程订单）  

A:       在SAP S/4HANA Cloud的产品路线图里不支持把成本差异还原到工单,只支持还原到物料。 

请见CIP Production order revaluation at actual prices of activities

1.3批量显示、下载多个物料的实际成本结果

Q:      如题  

A:       截止2208版本，新的应用‘显示实际成本核算结果’，基于33Q 实际成本的计算的结果， 根据成本组件信息来显示料工费等信息。 根据成本组件信息来显示并下载料工费等信息。 可以一次下载多物料的实际价格，标准价格等信息到excel

 

2成本会计-业务操作

2.1批量跑成本估算时，经常发生终止，或者被取消的原因

Q:      如题  

A:       1次超过10000个物料 建议分开几个任务来跑。还有可能是多个用户都在同时跑成本估算导致锁定而取消。

2.2是否能批量显示和导出销售订单里的物料标准成本？

Q:      在“material cost estimates” APP, list of existing material cost estimates中可以查到物料的标准成本，但客户有很多是按单生产的，销售订单会自己跑标准成本，这部分有没有类似APP或者CDS view可以批量看到且导出相关物料的标准成本？  

A:       现在没有CDS view或者APP可以批量查询销售订单的成本估算。 

2.3有没有财务手工报工的app？类似于KB21N？

Q:      如题  

A:       使用overhead_accountant登录使用app Manage Direct Activity Allocation （管理直接活动分配）

2.4冲销统计关键指标出现错误，无法冲销，想要更改为新的统计关键指标值该如何操作？

Q:      如题，常见报错信息BK822  

A:       使用app管理统计关键指标值，类型1的就是这个逻辑，如果重新再建一条相同月份的，会覆盖之前需要修改的数据。 

2.5公司间交易ML实际与标准差异不结转至发出商品中；差异全反应在材料成本差异-其他物料消耗中

Q:      运行完物料分类账之后，差异不会自动在库存商品与主营业务之间分配，全部结转至发出商品科目，每月需手工按数量比例结转，希望自动结转。  

A:       可以参考博客 里关于实际成本-发出商品差异结转部分的方案。

2.6订单结算结果是否可以预先导出检查？

Q:      差异表无法导出，结账前需要对异常做核查，需要在CO88运行后，导出表单。后台运行作业是PDF格式，并且不支持导出   

A:       无功能，无CIP。

2.7在制品计算作业的参数细节

Q:      执行work in process calculation这个作业的时候，参数选择里面有关于选项是否要包含“combined order”的。希望有能多指导说明combined order或者是参数选择的解释说明

A:       combined order是适用于S/4HANA的Mill/DIMP等行业解决方案, 现在Cloud上没有支持这个功能。 而且对于S/4HANA Cloud上的这个job，是基于经典ERP开发的，因此也提供了相关combined order的选项。 所以，默认勾选第一个即可。对客户现有业务没有什么影响。

2.8 生产订单号的生成不规则，调号和回跳频繁，如何解决？

Q:      如题  

A:       可以参照3074286 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Test Data Refresh - Number Range Object Maintenance and Adjustments - Troubleshooting guide 来解决 https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3074286

 

2.9为什么实际成本核算运行完毕之后发现有未分配金额？

Q:      如题  

A:       请参见浅谈S4 HANA Cloud 运行APP实际成本核算之后关于未分配金额的解释以及方案处理 (情况1和情况2) 

2.10为什么实际成本核算运行完毕之后发现有未分摊金额？

Q:      如题  

A:       请参见浅谈S/4 HANA Cloud 运行APP实际成本核算之后关于未分摊金额的解释以及方案处理 (情况1和情况2) 

2.11是否可以设定“创建物料成本估算”APP中的默认日期？

Q:      想要修改“创建物料成本估算”APP中的默认日期，双击后台配置中的“日期控制”，提示“没有维护或显示可能”。是否ES系统支持？OP可以的。 希望更改成本核算日期到99991231，而不是每个月的月末。因为当前系统太慢了，并不是所有的物料都需要参与成本估算（因为可能有些料不会发生任何成本价格上的变化）。  

A:       日期控制不能修改或添加，可以使用SAP预配置的PC01

2.12如何对生产订单打上删除标志？

Q:      由于没有打上删除标志的生产订单在完成结算并关闭之后还是会在下一次的运行差异计算中被筛选到，从而影响执行效率，如何解决这个问题？ 

A:       Run Variance Calculation - By Period (KKS5),差异计算会根据订单主数据进行选取，打上删除标记的订单不会进行差异计算，而不是根据Teco状态来选取订单。 

From <https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/393686> 

 细节清单"差异计算中的标识，出于性能原因，SAP 建议您不要在集中处理中设置“详细清单”标识。 

 From <https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/393686> 

官方建议给打上删除标记，并且如果未在集中运行中选中“详细清单”复选框，则可以大大提高性能. 

目前APP：“批量处理生产订单”可以批量打上REL, TECO, Closed等，无法打上删除标识. 

对于删除标识：客户可以使用API: API Reference | Production Order (Version 2) | SAP API Business Hub 批量处理生产订单。 

另外考虑测试并整体切换启用到基于事件的生产成本过账 (‏3F0‏)，替代现有的期末结算 - 工厂 (‏BEI‏) 

通过执行每个业务事件（例如生产活动确认、组件消耗，包括反冲等）将间接费用成本、在制品、差异过账到财务报表，不需要月末结账的步骤。从而解决期末结算-工厂中的app性能问题。  

也可以参考博文: https://blogs.sap.com/?p=1570986 

 

2.13一个物料有多个生产版本，如何处理以及选择的逻辑？

Q:      在实际业务中，经常会有一个物料存在多个物料清单，多个工艺路线，导致会有多个生产版本，想了解下在物料成本估算时系统是如何选择生产版本的？以及如何管理生产版本，比如只想试用最新的生产版本，如何操作？ 

A:       参考注释2973670来理解背后的逻辑。 

使用app 处理生产版本 锁定或者删除不需要的生产版本 

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F6400')/S29 

3成本会计-报表

3.1想了解成本还原报表如何实现？

Q:      客户属于离散型制造业，准备IPO，层级结构达到1000层，手工出报表不切实际。了解成本还原报表如何实现。   

A:       1. 根据和其他客户的联合创新，使用iRPA(智能机器人流程自动化)技术来实现当前复杂而且紧迫的成本还原报表的可行性较大。如果需要，可以帮助联系产品经理进行进一步的沟通； 

  1. 对于管理会计对生产流程中差异监控的痛点，推荐使用3F0（基于事件的生产成本过账），可以简化月结流程中对于间接费用计算、在制品计算和基于事件的差异计算等。如果需要，可以帮助联系产品经理进行进一步的沟通。 

SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud‎链接 如下，搜索关键字3F0 

https://rapid.sap.com/bp/#/browse/packageversions/BP_CLD_ENTPR 

实际成本相关的CDS View已经在路线图上，正在开发中。

3.2成本还原业务逻辑？

Q:      如题   

A:       请仔细阅读如下链接文档，尤其是成本汇总和差异部分，理解成本还原的逻辑，并且在Q系统测试并验证。 

https://help.sap.com/viewer/7f47a6d9441c46ac86c96fd27f6015f0/LATEST/zh-CN/4cc57871cfca4755a96d3929f16d9e38.html 

3.3如何在app成本中心 – 实际里增加标准字段？

Q:      APP: 成本中心(实际)，报表过滤器中没有客户、供应商、资产等信息维度，是否有其他办法可以添加增加客户、供应商及资产维度？   

A:       通过自定义字段添加

4成本会计-预算

4.1 S/4HANA Cloud提供的部分预算可用性控制功能

Q:      如题   

A:       提供基于项目/成本中心的预算可用性控制。请按需使用https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c56f622a2edf491b9f1b596b55587009/30cb8deab95e4d8c9420aeabb2ae496f.html?locale=zh-CN 这里的预算功能只能按照年度和总量来进行管控，可以配置超出金额是否自动发出错误或者警告信息；按照上传模板，可以做到按月上传预算金额，但是无法按照月度，季度来进行管控。 如果有新的需求，可以到https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/1169提交新的需求。关于预算在Cloud上的路线图，可以查阅https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?PRODUCT=67837800100800007389&range=CURRENT-LAST&q=BUDGET#Q1%202023 

4.2 SAC提供的全面预算功能

Q:      如题   

A:       SAC提供的全面预算功能； 

SAC预算介绍： 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c56f622a2edf491b9f1b596b55587009/63a578e27ffd47ceb2f9cd2319a0ee3e.html?locale=zh-CN 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/1fb1f4ce92f44fc983debc25ac1f2cc9.html?locale=zh-CN 

示例场景： 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/f912449e2b04426a8ebe37383f484f3a.html?locale=zh-CN 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/6ce52bc4ef0640a491ed3c45b5152435.html?locale=zh-CN 

申请30天试用SAC： 

https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/cloud-analytics.html 

5成本会计-基于事件的生产成本过账 (‏3F0‏)

5.1 基于事件的生产成本过账 (‏3F0‏)的优势简要介绍

Q:      如题   

A:       如果激活 3F0，BEI 月结步骤可以不执行。可以有效解决期末大量生产订单需要进行计算，结算等性能问题的情况。 

  • 可以跳过制造订单类型 YBM1、YBM2、YBM3、YBM4、YBM5、YBM9、YBW1、YPK1、YQ01、YQ02、YQ10 的月结操作。 
  • 3F0 对按库存生产和按订单生产的生产订单有效。 

5.2 基于事件的生产成本过账 (‏3F0‏)的一些重要资源

Q:      如题   

A:       如果激活 3F0，BEI 月结步骤可以不执行。可以有效解决期末大量生产订单需要进行计算，结算等性能问题的情况。 

  • 可以跳过制造订单类型 YBM1、YBM2、YBM3、YBM4、YBM5、YBM9、YBW1、YPK1、YQ01、YQ02、YQ10 的月结操作。 
  • 3F0 对按库存生产和按订单生产的生产订单有效。 

生产会计帮助 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/4032610758dc437089f0c28320eec93f/d1c7eaa7c7824c6293d13ef783fb43ce.html?locale=zh-CN 

基于事件的生产成本过账 (‏3F0‏) – 最佳业务实践 

 
https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolP/3F0 

 

有关如何从基于期间的生产成本过账(BEI)切换到基于事件的生产成本过账 (3F0) 的说明，请参阅注释 3042687 - FAQ_Production Accounting: Transition from BEI (Period-End Closing) to 3F0 (Event-Based Production Accounting) in S/4 HANA Cloud 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3042687 

 

有关通过产品成本收集器维护分类账特定物料价格的结果，请参阅注释 3042679 - - FAQ_Production Accounting: Restrictions for Product Cost Collectors with Parallel Accounting in S/4 HANA Cloud 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3042679 

 

有关通过生产订单/流程订单结算到非物料接收方的分类账特定物料价格维护的结果，请参阅注释 3042696 - FAQ_Production Accounting: Event-Based Cost Distribution to non-MAT Receivers。 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3042696 

 

有关使用“运行实际结算”进行分类账特定生产成本结算的结果，请参阅注释 3203113- FAQ_Production Accounting: Production Settlement in Parallel Ledgers in SAP S/4HANA Cloud 。 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3203113 

 

有关基于期间的生产成本解决方案的限制，请参阅注释3049064 - FAQ_Production Accounting: Restrictions for BEI (Period-End Closing) with Parallel Accounting in S/4HANA Cloud 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3049064 

 

有关基于事件的生产成本过账(3F0)的功能介绍，请参阅注释3042082 - FAQ_Production Accounting: Parallel Accounting with Event-Based Production Accounting (3F0) in S/4 HANA Cloud 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3042082 

 

有关基于事件的在制品过账的功能介绍，请查阅注释2737228 - FAQ_Production Accounting: Event-Based Work in Process Posting for Product Cost by Order 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2737228 

 

有关基于事件的差异过账的功能介绍，请查阅注释2910083 - FAQ_Production Accounting: Event-Based Variance Posting for Product Cost by Order 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2910083 

 

有关实时目标成本计算的功能介绍，请参阅注释2618359 - FAQ_Production Accounting: On-the-Fly Target Cost Calculation for Product Cost by Order 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2618359 

 

有关基于事件的联副产品成本分配，请参阅注释3042673 - FAQ_Production Accounting: Event-Based Cost Distribution for Co- and By- Products 

https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3042673 

 

5.3 基于事件的生产成本过账 (‏3F0‏)的日常处理要点 

Q:      S/4HANA Cloud在2105版本的重大升级是平行会计，基于这一特性的基于事件的生产成本过账(3F0)也从这一版本开始对于新实施的客户作为默认激活的范围项目，同时取代了范围项目BEI（默认不激活）。老客户就存在使用BEI，同时可能主动、被动操作会使用3F0的情况。    

A:       1. 如果激活了范围项目33Q 实际成本,  须要 运行APP F3683计划产品成本核算作业 中的任务模板基于事件的过账 - 实际成本核算重估的在制品数量过账（Event-Based Posting – WIP Quantity Posting for Actual Costing Revaluation ）； 

  1. 平时和月底运行 APP F5133 基于事件的解决方案监控器（Event-Based Solution Monitor - Product Costing）， 查看日常业务 有无问题，如果有问题，要按照如下步骤进行修正； 

如果有未过账或者过账异常的间接费用，月底须要运行APP F3683计划产品成本核算作业 中的任务模板后处理基于事件的过账 - 间接费用过账(Postprocess Event-Based Postings – Overhead Posting); 

如果有未过账或者过账异常的订单，月底须要运行 APP F3683计划产品成本核算作业 中的任务模板后处理基于事件的过账 - 产品成本核算（Postprocess Event-Based Postings – Product Costing）;

entry.title: NF-e Nota Técnica 2023.004 v1.10: novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal (Cloud)
entry.content:
Olá, pessoal

O governo brasileiro publicou a nota técnica 2023.004 v1.10-SEFAZ, que disponibiliza a inclusão de campos e alteração de campos existentes e regras de validação para os grupos Documentos de Importação, ICMS e Informação de Pagamento para nota fiscal eletrônica (NF-e). Clique aqui para versão em inglês.

Nesse blog post, abordaremos sobre atualizações referentes aos campos adicionados e alterados disponíveis para SAP S/4HANA Cloud:

Novos campos adicionados ao sistema

Grupo de Documentos de Importação

Foi adicionado o novo campo CPF Number à tabela Nota Fiscal Data for Import Documents.

 

Grupo de ICMS

O novo campo Exempted ICMS value deduction from the nota fiscal total foi adicionado à tabela existente Nota Fiscal line items. Esse indica se o valor ICMS isento é deduzido.

 

Grupo de Informações de Pagamento:

Os novos campos Payment Recipient CNPJ, Payment terminal identifier , Payment Date , Payment Transactional CNPJ e Region of the establishment's CNPJ where the payment is made foram adicionados à tabela existente Payment Information.

 

Mudanças em campos já existentes no sistema

O campo Authorization Number na Payment Information table agora suporta até 128 caracteres.

 

No grupo, foi adicionada a seguinte entrada no intervalo de valores do campo Process Origin Indicator:

  • 4-CONFAZ

 

Também foram adicionadas novas entradas ao intervalo de valores do campo Type Of Concession Act:

  • 14-SINIEF Adjustment
  • 15-ICMS Agreement

 

As alterações mencionadas neste blog post estão disponíveis nos seguintes objetos do sistema para SAP S/4HANA Cloud:

  • Create Nota Fiscal app
  • Change Nota Fiscal app
  • Display Nota Fiscal app
  • Additional Data for Nota Fiscal Cloud BAdI

Gostou desse post? Dê um Like e compartilhe o conteúdo com seus colegas. Fiquem à vontade para deixar um feedback, comentário ou pergunta no espaço abaixo.  E não esqueça de seguir a tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Logistics for Brazil na SAP Community para ficar ligado nas últimas notícias. 

Um abraço, 

Luize Boyen

entry.title: 提升供应链管理效率，物料临期管理App助力企业智能决策
entry.content:
在支持公有云客户的过程中，我们经常听到启用批次管理的客户在问是否有对临近效期物料的提醒、是否有对临近效期物料的批量查询报表，在标准产品中要查询相关信息需要检索多张报表，比如库存报表、批次信息等。为满足这一需求，我们在S/4HANA公有云上通过开发者可扩展性（也被称为云ABAP开发）开发了一款物料临期管理App，旨在帮助企业智能化地管理物料效期，提高供应链管理效率。

1. 业务背景

在生产制造如药品、医疗器械、化妆品、食品生产领域，或零售领域，物料的效期管理是供应链环节中至关重要的一环，在SAP公有云解决方案中，企业通常会为需要管理效期的物料启用批次管理，使用批次基本视图中自带的字段再叠加批次分类特性来管理生产日期、有效期、效期剩余天数、生产厂商、生产批号等产品效期管理相关的属性。业务上，物料的过期或临近过期可能导致废弃、损失利润甚至影响客户的满意度。因此，合理的效期管理对企业的供应链管理以及库存管理来说至关重要，本次研发的物料临近效期管理app可以批量的追踪管理在库的临期物料，同时根据中国本地化的业务需求，不同企业用户可在本报表中自定义效期管理阈值来进行查询，比如基于业务管理多样化的需求来设置特定企业是1年的效期警示范围抑或是半年的效期警示范围。最后，可基于报表的显示结果为后续业务操作处理提供决策依据，最大限度减少损失并优化库存周转。

2. 应用场景

2.1 库存优化

临近效期的物料识别：本报表可以快速识别出即将过期或临近效期的物料，帮助企业及时采取措施。如库存调整建议：基于物料的效期情况，提供库存调整建议，例如减少订单数量、加速销售或促销等。

2.2 销售策略制定

促销活动规划：根据临近效期的物料情况，制定有针对性的促销活动，促进库存流转，减少损失。定价优化：结合物料效期信息，调整定价策略，以促进销售并降低库存积压风险。

2.3 客户满意度提升

及时补货：通过报表提供的信息，及时补充临近效期物料，确保客户可以获得新鲜的产品。增强品牌形象：有效的效期管理可以减少客户投诉和退货，提升品牌形象和客户满意度。

2.4 客制化效期警示范围阈值

根据企业实际业务管理需求，设定效期警示范围阈值（如：1年以上为绿灯警示，6个月到1年为黄灯警示，6个月以内为红灯警示），报表基于此设定显示相对应的查询结果。

3. 价值

3.1 减少损失

通过及时识别临近效期的物料并采取相应措施，企业可以减少因过期或临近效期而导致的废弃和损失。

3.2 优化库存周转

提供库存调整建议和促销活动规划，帮助企业优化库存周转率，降低库存积压风险，释放资金。

3.3 提高销售效率

通过定价优化和促销活动制定，提高了销售效率和销售额，增强了企业的竞争力。

3.4 提升客户满意度

通过及时补货和确保产品新鲜度，提升了客户满意度，增强客户忠诚度，进而提升了品牌价值。 此次研发的物料临期管理app为公有云中物料效期管理功能锦上添花，创新点客户可结合自己库存管理的需求设定自定义的效期管理阈值，来实现客制化的效期管理，从而提升企业的库存管理水平，为后续业务活动提供决策依据，提升竞争力和盈利能力。

4. 功能展示

4.1 警示灯自定义阈值配置app

每个企业由于不同业务管理需要，可能对临近效期的提醒范围定义不同，使用警示灯自定义阈值配置app可以自定义设置效期多少范围需显示为红灯，多少范围需显示为黄灯，多少范围需显示为绿灯，自定义设置满足不同企业客制化效期管理需求。

4.2 物料临期报表app效果展示

本次研发的物料临期报表大体取值取自CDS view： I_MaterialStock_2 / I_BATCH/ batch characteristics，叠加逻辑比如：显示结果中如果批次主数据没有效期，则该条目数据不显示；若批次库存为0，则不显示在报表中；从I_MaterialStock_2根据物料工厂批次取数显示条目的时候，筛选stock type=01，汇总库存数量stock quantity显示成一条即可（若需要考虑其他状态的批次库存如冻结等可按需调整取值逻辑）。您也可根据您的实际业务需求增加或者减少报表显示字段，同时若需要有报表邮件提醒功能，也可作进一步探索。

结语

我们的物料临期管理App为企业提供了一种智能化、定制化的物料效期管理解决方案，帮助企业提高供应链管理效率，降低成本，增强竞争力，实现可持续发展。欢迎有相关业务需求的客户在自己的系统中测试并使用。

entry.title: Boost SCM Efficiency: Material Expiry Mgmt App Empowers Intelligent Decision-Making for Enterprises
entry.content:
In the process of supporting public cloud customers, we frequently hear inquiries from clients who have enabled batch management, asking whether there are reminders for nearing expiry materials and batch query reports for such materials. In standard products, retrieving relevant information often requires searching through multiple reports, such as inventory reports and batch details. To meet this demand, we have developed a Material Expiry Management App on S/4HANA public cloud through developer extensibility (also known as cloud ABAP development), aiming to help enterprises intelligently manage material expiry and enhance supply chain management efficiency.

1. Business Background

In industries like pharmaceuticals, medical devices, cosmetics, food production, or retail, managing material expiry is a crucial aspect of the supply chain. In SAP public cloud solutions, companies usually enable batch management for materials that require expiry management. They utilize batch basic view fields supplemented with batch classification characteristics to manage production dates, expiration dates, remaining days until expiry, manufacturers, and batch numbers related to product expiry management. From a business perspective, expired or near-expiry materials can lead to waste, profit loss, or even affect customer satisfaction. Therefore, proper expiry management is vital for enterprise supply chain and inventory management. The Material Expiry Management app developed this time can track and manage near-expiry materials in stock in bulk. Additionally, based on localized business requirements in China, different enterprise users can customize expiry management threshold values in this report for queries. For example, specific companies can set a one-year expiry warning range or a six-month expiry warning range based on diversified business management needs. Finally, the display results of the report provide decision-making basis for subsequent business operations, minimizing losses and optimizing inventory turnover.

2. Application Scenarios

2.1 Inventory Optimization

Identification of near-expiry materials: This report can quickly identify materials that are about to expire or are near expiry, helping companies take timely measures. For example, inventory adjustment suggestions: Based on the material expiry situation, provide inventory adjustment suggestions, such as reducing order quantities, accelerating sales, or promotions.

2.2 Sales Strategy Development

Promotion planning: Based on the near-expiry material situation, formulate targeted promotional activities to promote inventory turnover and reduce losses. Pricing optimization: Adjust pricing strategies based on material expiry information to promote sales and reduce the risk of inventory backlog.

2.3 Customer Satisfaction Enhancement

Timely replenishment: Through the information provided by the report, replenish near-expiry materials in a timely manner to ensure that customers can obtain fresh products. Enhanced brand image: Effective expiry management can reduce customer complaints and returns, enhance brand image and customer satisfaction.

2.4 Customized Expiry Warning Thresholds

According to the actual business management needs of the enterprise, set expiry warning threshold values (e.g., green light warning for over one year, yellow light warning for six months to one year, and red light warning for less than six months), and the report displays corresponding query results based on this setting.

3. Value

3.1 Reduction of Losses

By timely identifying near-expiry materials and taking corresponding measures, companies can reduce waste and losses caused by expiration or near expiry.

3.2 Optimization of Inventory Turnover

Providing inventory adjustment suggestions and promotion planning helps companies optimize inventory turnover, reduce the risk of inventory backlog, and release funds.

3.3 Improvement of Sales Efficiency

Through pricing optimization and promotion activity formulation, sales efficiency and sales revenue are increased, enhancing the company's competitiveness.

3.4 Enhancement of Customer Satisfaction

By timely replenishment and ensuring product freshness, we have enhanced customer satisfaction, boosted customer loyalty, and consequently elevated brand value. This development of the Material Expiry Management app adds an extra layer of sophistication to the material expiry management function in the public cloud. The innovative aspect lies in allowing customers to customize expiry management thresholds according to their inventory management needs, thus achieving personalized expiry management. This enhancement elevates the company's inventory management standards, provides decision-making basis for subsequent business activities, and enhances competitiveness and profitability.

4. Function Demonstration

4.1 Customizable Warning Threshold Configuration App

Due to varying business management needs, each company may define different ranges for nearing expiry reminders. The Customizable Warning Threshold Configuration App allows users to set customized ranges for when to display red, yellow, or green warning lights, meeting the diverse customization needs of different enterprises for expiry management.

4.2 Material Expiry Report App Effect Display

The material expiry report developed this time generally extracts data from the CDS view: I_MaterialStock_2 / I_BATCH / batch characteristics, with additional logic such as: if batch master data has no expiry date, the entry will not be displayed; if batch inventory is 0, it will not be displayed in the report; when extracting entries based on material plant batches from I_MaterialStock_2, filter for stock type=01, and summarize the stock quantity as one entry (if other statuses of batch inventory need to be considered, adjust the extraction logic accordingly). You can also add or remove report display fields based on your actual business needs. Additionally, if there is a need for report email reminders, further exploration can be conducted.

Conclusion

Our Material Expiry Management App provides enterprises with an intelligent and customized solution for managing material expiry, helping them improve supply chain management efficiency, reduce costs, enhance competitiveness, and achieve sustainable development. Customers with relevant business needs are welcome to test and use it in your systems.

entry.title: What you need to know about Finance in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
As a standardized Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) system, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition offers a wide range of industry best practices, a pre-configured system environment, the security customers need in the age of digital transformation and fast time to value.

To fully benefit from the potential of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, it's essential to recognize some relevant aspects that come with predefined settings. While these settings may differ from SAP S/4HANA (on premise) and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, understanding these distinctions is key to optimizing your experience, particularly from a Finance perspective.

Let's explore some of these features and considerations for implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, with a focus on Finance, in SAP Central Business Configuration (CBC) based system environments:

1. Pre-Delivered Controlling Area: In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, there is one pre-delivered controlling area (A000).

In case you are familiar with SAP S/4HANA (on premise) and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, you might know that you could have more than one controlling area. However, as this was/is not a recommended scenario, and a growing number of customers are executing a controlling area merge.

As in SAP S/4HANA (on premise) and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, the currency of the controlling area is defined at the tenant level during system provisioning and is referred to as the "Group Currency".

2. Finance Primary Settings: The Finance primary settings -"Fiscal Year Variant for the Leading Ledger and Group Currency" are defined early in the SAP Central Business Configuration implementation project. The fiscal year variant that is assigned to the leading ledger is defined for the whole system in this stage and it cannot be changed later. However, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition offers the flexibility of setting up an alternative fiscal year variant for the local ledger. You can find more details in SAP Note 3169537 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Release Restriction Note for the Alternative Fiscal Year Variant - SAP for Me.

3. Introduction of an Additional Ledger: In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition all the required ledgers must be defined in the initial system set-up. This means that you must consider at the time of the initial scoping phase whether you will need an additional ledger.

Special consideration is required for Ledger 4G which is available with the Group Valuation scope item (5W2).

In other words, you need to consider whether the Group Valuation (5W2) scope item is relevant for your project. As this scope item applies to the entire group, once set up and ledger 4G is activated, it will be automatically available for all legal entities.

For more details, please check SAP note 3093830 - SAP S/4HANA Cloud: Release Restriction Note for Group Valuation - SAP for Me and 3100892 - Group Valuation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud - SAP for Me.

Once you decide Group Valuation scope item (5W2) is in scope for you project, you must confirm the above two notes in order to activate it.

4. Ledgers and Accounting Principles: The system’s default setup assigns the local accounting principle to the leading ledger. The recommendation is to change this assignment and assign the leading ledger to the accounting principle of the group (usually IFRS or USGAAP), for example, to support intercompany processes. For more information, see also Parallel Accounting Using Parallel Ledgers | SAP Help Portal.

The local accounting principles should be assigned to the parallel non-leading ledger 2L on company code level. By doing so you make sure that you have the required depreciation areas available in Asset Accounting:

 

If you have not changed these assignments before you started the project and you have transactional data in the test system, you can remove the transactional data and then change the assignment. To find out how this is done, see Reset Transaction Data | SAP Help Portal.

Please be aware that this only works if you don't have transactional data in your production system. As soon as you are live with your production system and have made your first postings, a change of these assignments is not possible anymore.

If you have specific business requirements where the group accounting principle is one of the local ones (that is, not IFRS or USGAAP), you can set this up by activating the relevant scope items for IFRS and USGAAP (1GA - IFRS or 2VA - USGAAP). This will make ledger 2L or 3L available in your system. You can then assign the leading ledger 0L to the local accounting principle that is used for the entire group and the parallel ledger (2L or 3L) to another local accounting principle.

Please consider this not a recommended approach, but rather a work around for specific business needs.

 

 

4. Tax Ledger Setup:  In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you can use the extension ledger for tax adjustments, if needed - assuming that it’s sufficient to post the tax adjustments in the general ledger (G/L) only. For more information, see Extension Ledger | SAP Help Portal.

5. Currency considerations:  The system is based on a maximum of three currencies, each serving specific purposes. While the company code currency and group currency are fixed, the third currency is flexible and can be used for a company's specific business needs.
Among the most important aspects regarding currencies are the following:

  • The company code currency (currency type 10) is the local country currency so it cannot be different/changed.
  • The group currency (currency type 30) is set up at the tenant level and is also valid for the controlling area. It must be set up during the initial system provisioning.
  • The freely defined currency type is an optional, additional currency type that you can configure according to your business needs.  

You can also specify if any of these currencies is to be used as the “functional currency” for reporting purposes. However, the recommended approach is to create the Functional currency as freely defined currency, as in certain areas like Asset Accounting, the functional currency overrules by default the company code currency.

For more information on currencies, see the following SAP Help Center documents and blog posts:

  • Currencies
  • Create Additional Currency Types
  • Define Functional Currency
  • Change of Functional Currency | SAP Help Portal
  • Freely Defined Currency or Additional Currency + F... - SAP Community

6. G/L Accounts Creation: G/L accounts are considered as configuration objects in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and can only be created in the development system. The system ensures data integrity by eliminating duplicates during new process deployment.

If you need to create a new G/L account, we recommend you copy an existing G/L account.  You have the possibility to renumber and rename pre-delivered and existing G/L accounts, as long as you do that in the development system.

Being considered configuration objects, the G/L accounts in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition must be transported to test and production environments. You can find more details under Chart of Accounts Maintenance in a 3-System Landscape | SAP Help Portal.

When a new standard SAP process is deployed where new G/L accounts are also relevant, the system will ensure that duplicates are eliminated.  If, for example, you are currently using a certain G/L code for a different purpose, and this G/L code is now delivered as part of the standard solution, the system will read this information and the duplicate account will be delivered with a new value automatically. So, none of the new created GL accounts will be overwritten.

7. Customer Invoicing: Customer invoices are to be issued through Sales and Distribution as a billing document.

For more details, see Output Management for Sales Documents and Billing Documents | SAP Help Portal.

8. Master Data Deletion: In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the deletion of master data at the tenant level requires alternative approaches, such as individual deletion features, archiving, or the "test data refresh" service.

Please consider the following procedures:

  • According to the master data type – individual deletion features are available.
  • You can also consider archiving via SAP Information Lifecycle Management (ILM), where no deletion is possible.
  • Investigate if you can use the service called ‘’test data refresh’’. Its main use case is to provide realistic data (from the production system) for testing, once live. During the implementation and before being productive, as a sort of workaround to provide an ‘’empty’’ testing box. Your production system should be empty and by refreshing the test system using the service, your test system will be "empty" again. For additional information about this service, see Test Data Refresh | SAP Help Portal.
    To use this service, please raise an incident to SAP Support.

9. Financial Statement Version Editing: Changes to the financial statement version must be made in the development system (they are also considered configuration objects) and transported across the landscape, ensuring a systematic and controlled process.

10. Configuration Management: Deleting configuration settings that have been saved or confirmed is only possible to a limited extent. Expert configuration may be needed or assessed case-by-case for specific deletions.

You can get an understanding in this regard by checking the accelerator ‘’ Configuration Activity.xlsm’’ in the roadmap viewer to identify the configuration points per scope item for which deletion will be blocked/restricted.

To do this, you go to Roadmap Viewer (sap.com). Switch to the Accelerators tab and find the accelerator under Prepare.

This is also applicable for organizational structure elements. For example, specified company codes, will always remain in the system environment.

For additional details, you can also check Guided Framework for Simplified Organizational Structure Set up in CBC for SAP S/4HANA Cloud | SAP Blogs.

11. Pre-defined Depreciation Areas: In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, depreciation areas are derived from accounting principles and countries and therefore pre-defined.

You can introduce additional statistical depreciation areas (only in Asset Accounting without posting in general ledger), with scope items 5HG - Asset Accounting – Additional Depreciation Area and 5KF - Asset Under Construction – Additional Depreciation Area.  Their main use case is for specific industry-related requirements and reporting.

These scope items can be introduced only during initial scoping. For additional details, please see  Additional Depreciation Area | SAP Help Portal.

In conclusion, understanding these features and dependencies will empower you and your team to successfully manage your implementation of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Are there any other aspects you would like to explore further? If so, let us know.

entry.title: Amount to Words using SAP Adobe Forms Scripting - JavaScript
entry.content:
